input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #8742 [Automation] java run fails for org.apache.pekko:pekko-actor_2.13:2.0.0-M1; label=fails-java-run; body_chars=8015

risks: The observed failure is from stale tests using deprecated org.apache.pekko.actor.TypedActor/TypedProps APIs that are present in 1.1.5 but absent from 2.0.0-M1; this needs test/API adaptation rather than setup.

Pekko docs mention pekko-testkit as a test-scope helper for classic actor testing, but meaningful coverage can still be written directly against pekko-actor with ActorSystem, Props, ask/latches, and config, so it is not a required deterministic setup dependency.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: Resolved pekko-actor_2.13:2.0.0-M1 has only scala-library and typesafe-config dependencies and normal use is in-process ActorSystem/Props/config usage; no Docker image, extra Maven dependency, or global environment/system property is required before meaningful coverage is reachable.
